## What this PR adds

<!-- Brief description: a question, a resource, a worked design, a correction. -->

## Type

- [ ] New question(s)
- [ ] New resource(s)
- [ ] New / improved worked design
- [ ] Correction (outdated number, dead link, better explanation)
- [ ] Other:

## Quality checklist

- [ ] **Answer-first, senior voice** — mechanism then production implication, no fluff.
- [ ] **Every claim is defensible** — a metric or a cited source, not an assertion.
- [ ] **Multiple-choice** questions have a *why* for **every** option.
- [ ] **Real questions carry a provenance label** — ✅ Reported (with link) or 🔮 Representative.
- [ ] **Links are typed + annotated** (`📄 📘 🎬 🧑‍🏫 🛠️ 💻`), ~8 per topic max.
- [ ] **Repos are license-noted** (stars + license); only MIT/Apache/CC0 adapted (with attribution).
- [ ] **Dated 2026** where the claim is time-sensitive.
- [ ] Placed in the correct topic file; links resolve (CI runs lychee).
